calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2008 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2008 Continued To Feb-19-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
William C. Johnson, Esq. for Petitioner: Jeremiah DeRham, present as Guardian ad litem for: Georgiana DeRham, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $2,300.00
Medical Expenses $600.00
Costs $803.00
A net balance of $6,297.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Citi Bank, 6100 Gery Blvd., San Francisco, CA. 94121, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
